pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies machine name 'promo_banner'; export_result.sh queries 'block_content.type.promo_banner' from config table; verifier.py checks block_type_exists field

task.json description field specifies machine name 'field_promo_link'; export_result.sh queries 'field.storage.block_content.field_promo_link' from config table; verifier.py checks field_link_exists field

task.json description field specifies machine name 'field_coupon_code'; export_result.sh queries 'field.storage.block_content.field_coupon_code' from config table; verifier.py checks field_coupon_exists field

task.json description field specifies 'with the description Summer Audio Sale'; export_result.sh queries block_content_field_data table for info LIKE '%Summer Audio Sale%'; verifier.py checks exact match against expected value

task.json description field specifies 'Set the Coupon Code to SUMMER20'; export_result.sh queries block_content__field_coupon_code table for field_coupon_code_value; verifier.py checks exact match against this value

task.json description field specifies 'Set the Promo Link to /products'; Drupal Link fields store internal paths with 'internal:' prefix in database; export_result.sh queries block_content__field_promo_link table for field_promo_link_uri; verifier.py checks if link contains 'product', 'shop', or '/products'

task.json description field specifies 'place this block into the Sidebar region of the default theme'; export_result.sh parses config table for block.block.% entries with region field matching sidebar/sidebar_first/sidebar_second; verifier.py checks placement_found field

privileged_info_summary: The create_promo_banner_block task creates synthetic data in a Drupal Commerce environment. All metadata values are verified as correct: the block type machine name is 'promo_banner', with Link field 'field_promo_link' and Text field 'field_coupon_code'. The block instance has description 'Summer Audio Sale', coupon code 'SUMMER20' (stored as plain text), and promo link stored as 'internal:/products' (Drupal Link field format for internal paths). The block is placed in the 'sidebar' region of the default theme. All values align with the task description and are checked by the export_result.sh and verifier.py scripts.
